series_metadata.series_description: Includes application pages that are being replaced as a result of a permit modification and revised pages (e.g., from an NOD) that do not become a part of the final authorized permit application.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months after permit modification or renewal is issued final unless an appeal has been filed. In appeal cases, retain until 6 months after the appeal is finally resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
